message:
perf(types): change PageData inner storage from Arc<Vec<u8>> to Arc<[u8]>

Arc<Vec<u8>> requires two heap allocations (Arc header → Vec header → data)
and two pointer dereferences on every as_bytes() call. Arc<[u8]> uses a
single allocation (Arc header + data inline), eliminating one indirection
and improving cache locality on the hot path through pager reads.

Changes:
- PageData::data field type: Arc<Vec<u8>> → Arc<[u8]>
- zeroed(): vec![0u8; n].into() (Vec→Arc<[u8]> conversion via From impl)
- from_vec(): data.into() instead of Arc::new(data)
- as_bytes_mut(): Arc::make_mut returns &mut [u8] directly (no .as_mut_slice())
- into_vec(): try_unwrap returns boxed slice, .into() converts to Vec;
  clone path uses .to_vec() instead of (*arc).clone()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
